creator: cpm@freebsd.org
text:
Chromium has been updated to 72.0.3626.119 and we started to modify some patches to return "freebsd"

https://github.com/gliaskos/freebsd-chromium/blob/master/www/chromium/files/patch-tools_gn_build_gen.py
